name: Now4real
description: Connect OpenClaw to Now4real pagechat via webhooks

enabled.description: Enable or disable the Now4real channel

openClawDisplayName.description: Display name shown for the bot when replying

openClawDisplayIcon.description: URL of the icon shown for the bot when replying

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Turn the Now4real channel on or off.

webhookAuthorization.label: Webhook Authorization
webhookAuthorization.help: Specify the value for the HTTP "Authorization" header to authenticate requests sent from the Now4real cloud to your webhook.

openClawDisplayName.label: Bot Display Name
openClawDisplayName.help: The name shown for the bot when it replies in the chat.

openClawDisplayIcon.label: Bot Display Icon
openClawDisplayIcon.help: URL of the avatar image shown for the bot when it replies in the chat.
